data.content: Implemented the Dispatch > Advanced pool-row fix on branch feat/foolery-7a57. AgentDisplayLabel now wraps multi-pill content within the content-sized label column, which prevents pill overflow from colliding with the adjacent numeric summary in multi-pill rows. Added a regression test covering the wrapping/content-sizing contract. Validation: bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/settings-pools-layout.test.ts, bun run test, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run build. bun run lint completed with one pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx from react-hooks/incompatible-library.
